programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver discusses structured settlements; payments designed to sustain victims of injury or wrongful death over long periods of time.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy engages with the audience as he approaches an ample spectrum of personal topics, both relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that people can find light and hope in all things if they just try to see them through a lens of love; whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: In 1991, the murder of four teenage girls rocks the city of Austin; a lack of hard evidence soon thwarts the investigation.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: After years of false leads and wrongful arrests, new investigators take over the case and revisit a key interrogation video.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: As the investigation increasingly focuses on the young suspects, police subject them to further videotaped interrogations, which reveal contradictory and unstable versions of what happened and some confessions.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: When new DNA evidence leads to Springsteen and Scott's release, the victims' families must grapple with the unknown.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: APD cold case detective Dan Jackson reveals the behind-the-scenes details of the painstaking work that he and other investigators used in tracking down the killer of four teenage girls in Austin, Texas in 1991.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman answers a cryptic ad for a housekeeping job at a luxurious yet foreboding New York City high-rise. Upon arrival, she discovers residents have vanished without a trace for decades, fueling whispers of a satanic cult lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: Earth, Wind & Fire (To Be Celestial vs. That's the Weight of the World)
programme.desc: Directed by Ahmir Questlove Thompson, exploring the musical origins and lasting cultural impact of Earth, Wind and Fire.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: The USMNT's final roster is revealed for the 2026 World Cup.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

programme.title: Men
programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.title: Judy
programme.desc: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: After meeting Frederick von Mierers, a guru who preaches New Age spirituality, the young Hoyt Richards adopts and spreads his teachings.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: As Frederick prepares for a coming global cataclysm, model Jacki Adams joins Eternal Values and exposes the group's true nature.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: Earth, Wind & Fire (To Be Celestial vs. That's the Weight of the World)
programme.desc: Directed by Ahmir Questlove Thompson, exploring the musical origins and lasting cultural impact of Earth, Wind and Fire.

programme.title: The Smashing Machine
programme.desc: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: The Laramie Project
programme.desc: "The Laramie Project" is set in and around Laramie, Wyoming, in the aftermath of the murder of 21-year-old Matthew Shepard. To create the stage version of "The Laramie Project," the eight-member New York-based Tectonic Theatre Project traveled to Laramie, Wyoming, recording hours of interviews with the town's citizens over a two-year period. The film adaptation dramatizes the troupe's visit, using the actual words from the transcripts to create a portrait of a town forced to confront itself.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: Midsommar
programme.desc: A young American couple, their relationship foundering, travel to a Swedish midsummer festival where a seemingly pastoral paradise transforms into a sinister, dread-soaked nightmare as the locals reveal their terrifying agenda.

programme.title: The Lobster
programme.desc: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Marty Supreme
programme.desc: Marty Mauser, a wily hustler with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: The group splinters and eventually dwindles in North Carolina; as 1999 approaches, Hoyt grows skeptical and escapes to California where he grapples with the shame and regret of recruiting others while hurting his own family, as he reconnects and reflects on his experiences with former members.

programme.title: Earth, Wind & Fire (To Be Celestial vs. That's the Weight of the World)
programme.desc: Directed by Ahmir Questlove Thompson, exploring the musical origins and lasting cultural impact of Earth, Wind and Fire.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: As Frederick prepares for a coming global cataclysm, model Jacki Adams joins Eternal Values and exposes the group's true nature.

programme.title: Judy
programme.desc: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander, also known as the AANHPI, communities in America.

programme.title: The Commandant's Shadow
programme.desc: Hans Jürgen Höss, the 87-year-old son of Rudolf Höss, as he faces his father's terrible legacy for the first time. His father was the camp commandant of Auschwitz and masterminded the murder of over a million Jews. While Hans Jürgen Höss enjoyed a happy childhood playing with many toys in the family villa at Auschwitz, Jewish cellist Anita Lasker-Wallfisch was playing for her life to survive the notorious concentration camp.

programme.title: Joker
programme.desc: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

programme.title: About Face: Supermodels Then and Now
programme.desc: Carmen Dell'Orefice, Carol Alt, Isabella Rossellini, Christie Brinkley, Beverly Johnson and other models discuss their groundbreaking careers.

programme.title: Donyale Luna: Supermodel
programme.desc: The life and career of Donyale Luna, who was one of the first Black models to appear on the cover of Vogue.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
programme.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Chronicles the lucrative world of YouTube vlogging, including social media archival footage of Myka and James Stauffer; Hannah Cho, an avid YouTube consumer, explains how daily videos and constant updates provide a sense of community.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: The business of family vlogging is explored; as adoption day approaches, the Stauffers post videos counting down the days.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Concerned fans turn to critics; commentators shed light on the Stauffers' catalogue of content, dissecting their lavish lifestyle and their adopted son's treatment; an update from the family results in brands dropping their sponsorship.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: Sworn to preserve intergalactic order, the Green Lantern Corps has existed for centuries. Its newest recruit, Hal Jordan, is the first human to join the ranks. The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have thus far been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a gifted and cocky test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when a new enemy called Parallax threatens the universal balance of power.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: The Armenian mob muscles in on Nancy's grow house while she deals with Silas and Megan's pregnancy.

programme.title: Weeds

programme.title: Weeds

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Peter is embarrassed when his bust of Heylia goes awry thanks to Nancy's warning.

programme.desc: After a near bust by the DEA, Heylia puts serious pressure on Nancy to make things right.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Having eavesdropped on Nancy and Conrad's phone conversation, Peter stops playing nice.

programme.title: Weeds

programme.title: Weeds

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.desc: Reece's driving lesson with Disneyland Darren quickly descends into chaos, but beneath the madness Darren reveals a surprising need to be a father figure. At school, Mia-Louise lands a football academy place but clashes with disciplined teammate Daisy, whose professionalism exposes Mia-Louise's attitude problems. Aimee attends a high-stakes audition for a Cilla Black musical with Mr Dunn, but class prejudice makes her question whether she belongs. When Darren arranges a secret hookup at the same hotel, Reece and Christopher mistakenly believe Dunn is cheating on Jodie. Their attempt to expose him spirals into farce, sending an angry husband to the wrong room and triggering absurd misunderstandings. Amid the chaos, Aimee finds her voice in the audition while Mia- Louise's prank video goes viral, threatening her football future.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about the everyday trials and tribulations of family life. programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about the everyday trials and tribulations of family life. Chris loses interest in being a youth scout and would rather pursue drawing and art instead, so the scout master kicks him out. Peter takes the family to the Big Apple to try to have Chris reinstated to the scouts. After Peter takes a wrong turn on the way, the family ends up at a Native American casino. Lois then becomes obsessed with the slot machines.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. After Steve shows a lack of interest in Stan's job, Stan replaces him with Barry, Steve's malicious friend. Barry frames Steve to eliminate him from the household, but when Steve discovers Barry's weakness, he relies on his CIA skills to save the family. Meanwhile, Roger takes an impressive keg-stand and uses it to become a fraternity brother.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series from the creator of Family Guy about CIA agent Stan Smith. As the Smiths continue to live in Saudi Arabia, Stan is enjoying the male-dominated society, while the rest of the family struggles with the different social norms. Linda books the Belchers for a summer holiday in a lakeside cabin hoping to get them to forge some lasting family memories, but it's an immediate disaster as the lake is tainted with parasites, there are gigantic swarms of biting bugs about, it's swelteringly hot and there is no water or toilets. When Bob and the kids avoid cabin fever by secretly watching a portable TV, Linda finds out about it and storms out of the cabin into great peril...

When the Mob help Peter destroy his car so he can get a new one, he is asked to repay his debt by taking the Don's nephew to the movies - however, Peter's informing Paulie that they cannot hang out any more because of Lois causes a misunderstanding that leads Paulie to believe that Peter wants Lois killed.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Subversive animated comedy about the everyday trials and tribulations of family life. When a heatwave hits Quahog, Peter gets Brian to enter a dog show to win 500 dollars so that the family can get a new air conditioner. When they argue over a trick that goes wrong, Brian walks out on the family and Peter replaces him with a cat. Brian struggles to assert his civil rights and soon ends up at the pound.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. When Francine's birthday brings back haunting memories of a celebrity film moment stolen by George Clooney, Francine's new dream is to destroy the star. But when she tries to win Clooney's heart with the intention of breaking it, Stan actually falls for him and sabotages the plan. Back at home, Roger builds a vineyard and starts up a private sweatshop of foster children.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about CIA agent Stan Smith. Because of a past incident at his own prom, where he was lured into a dance with the homecoming queen only to have a pile of pigs dropped on him, Stan wants revenge by showing off that he married a homecoming queen, Francine. A proud Stan accompanies Francine to her reunion, but when they find out that two ballots were lost and that Francine didn't actually win the crown, Stan is devastated.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Gene's decision to spend all his savings on trying a new VR gaming arcade comes with disappointment as the games are horrible and refunds are not on the agenda, Bob journeys into cyberspace with his son to help him cope with the letdown - meanwhile, Louise and Tina build a towering house of cards out of store menus, but fear of completion becomes a problem as the structure nears the diner ceiling.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. When Louise can't decide what to pick for her preferred future job for a Career Day, her family suggest ideas in a series of exciting and wacky stories.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Reece's driving lesson with Disneyland Darren quickly descends into chaos, but beneath the madness Darren reveals a surprising need to be a father figure. At school, Mia-Louise lands a football academy place but clashes with disciplined teammate Daisy, whose professionalism exposes Mia-Louise's attitude problems. Aimee attends a high-stakes audition for a Cilla Black musical with Mr Dunn, but class prejudice makes her question whether she belongs. When Darren arranges a secret hookup at the same hotel, Reece and Christopher mistakenly believe Dunn is cheating on Jodie. Their attempt to expose him spirals into farce, sending an angry husband to the wrong room and triggering absurd misunderstandings. Amid the chaos, Aimee finds her voice in the audition while Mia- Louise's prank video goes viral, threatening her football future.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: The first episode of a sitcom following three desperate young men who reside in ancient Rome. Things take an upward turn for the boys when Marcus meets some fit Britons in a courtyard and Stylax finds a flyer for an orgy, but slave Grumio has to get creative in order to put food on the table after spending his grocery budget on orgy tickets.

Jet setters Sonia and Peter have resorted to staycations at home since having two young children, but their backyard is more of a headache than a holiday - Brian and Sarah therefore create a luxury vacation destination in their backyard that includes a pool, a spa, an outdoor kitchen and a stunning four-season structure.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern is back with the exciting and iconic gameshow as another brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker and, by opening those iconic 22 red boxes in the right order, could be in with the chance of winning a life-changing cash prize. There are no questions here except for one: Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Londoner Frankie is hoping to find her dream man. Which of the three single men shopping for her will impress her enough to win a date?

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. As the novelty of the chore chart wears off, Billie and Greg continue to address the kids' behaviour and debate whether to get Nelly the phone she so desperately wants with her birthday approaching - elsewhere, the family take a trip to a history museum in an attempt to show them just how lucky they are, and after turning up to Sue's house drunk, Billie and her mum decide that it's time to have an emotional heart-to-heart with Chatty.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Pete and Chloe Sims have had more awkward chats than they've had hot dinners, but they are still no closer to getting their friendship back on track - the former self-proclaimed soulmates have reached a stalemate and it's time for a third-party intervention. Pete has enlisted a therapist to help the pair navigate their issues - when all three sit down for a serious heart-to-heart, will bridges be built and will Pete and Chloe acknowledge that their feelings for one another may run deeper than they've been letting on when some shocking secrets come to light? Elsewhere, Dan and Amber have been unshakeable recently, but a spanner's been thrown in the works - it turns out that Dan confided in Demi that their relationship wasn't all rosy during lockdown... and the information is winging its way back to Amber fast. How will she react when she finds out her significant other has been voicing concerns about their relationship to none other than a Sims, and will she be able to move on?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. The second part of the fourth series reunion sees Monica break down while reflecting on her relationship with her mother and the rift between Angie and Monica grows as they disagree about the unseen events from Greek Easter - the group is then joined by Mary as she comes to Monica's defence and sheds light on where she currently stands with the rest of the women.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Welcome to the Freak Show: Reality show. Heather finds herself isolated after the trip to Mexico and sets out to prove that Tamra is the cause of everyone's issues. [S] S17 Ep16

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire
programme.desc: Reality series. Ampika hosts a lavish charity event and instructs the ladies to be on their best behaviour - with Lystra still reeling, Rachel exasperated, and Paige determined to get answers, the masks are slipping from the start.

programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Vick Hope, Ranvir Singh and Iain Stirling all trying to 'say what they see' as they guess well-known phrases for the chance to win a 50,000-pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the dramatic and fast-paced game show. The 34 remaining players are in for a shock.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Pete and Chloe Sims drop a major bombshell in a therapy session when they admit that the lines have been blurred when it comes to their friendship - the advice they received was straightforward, take some time apart or lose the friendship, and both parties are determined to stick to it... but how will each of them cope without the other when push comes to shove, does absence really make the heart grow fonder, or is it a case of out of sight, out of mind for good? Elsewhere, Yaz and Amber have had their fair share of arguments - but they are BFFs right now as far as they're concerned and nothing's going to get in the way of that... step forward Nicole, Yaz's oldest friend who has some very strong opinions on Miss Turner and isn't afraid to share them with Yaz. Nicole thinks Amber is a fake friend who makes Yaz feel insecure - when Amber crashes their girls' spa trip, will Nicole be able to hold her tongue or will she deliver some home truths to her bestie's bestie?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City

programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? programme.desc: With Fiz refusing to speak to him, John sees red when he collects a flirtatious Rosie from town in his cab. Liam asks Carla to meet him and Janice keeps quiet about a lottery win.

programme.desc: Detective drama featuring Colin Dexter's enigmatic chief inspector. programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. Maggie is accused of medical negligence when an elderly lady suffering from chronic bronchitis suddenly dies in her care, and the allegations mount further still when her will reveals that Maggie was left the contents of a bank account and a valuable painting - meanwhile, Greengrass manages to predict horse race winners while asleep.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The villagers organise a group protest against Lord Ashfordly's refusal to allow ramblers across his land. Meanwhile, a convicted armed robber returns to Aidensfield. His reappearance leaves people to presume it is so he can collect the money once stolen from the bank. Greengrass finds a new vocation as a lucky chimney sweep.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Harriet Farmer wakes up after being in a coma since the night she tried to elope. Harriet's boyfriend Finn Robson has been missing since the couple tried to run away together a year before. When Edward Stannington - the president of the local chess society - is found dead in a lake with an ice pick in his back, his damaged car is nearby and Kate finds a clue in his mouth, a chess notation known as the Sicilian Defence. Could the attack which left Harriet for dead a year ago be linked to moves on a chess board, and where is her boyfriend Finn?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Anna grows tired of being used as a pawn in her father's attempt to bring down the King family. Marlon receives a boost when Rodney offers him work at Home Farm over Christmas.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Detective series, based on the novels by Caroline Graham, that follows Inspector Barnaby as he investigates murder mysteries in Middle England. In the peaceful English village of Burton Mantle, the tranquillity of the nearby commune is shattered by the violent and unexplained death of its founder Ian Cragie - it's up to DCI Barnaby and his eager sidekick Sergeant Troy to find the motive and the murderer from assembled social misfits including an heiress, a psychic, and a boy who has lost his tongue.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin investigate a shocking crime in which a man is attacked and has his kidney removed. Suspecting organ trafficking, they discover that the kidney was earmarked to be transplanted into a wealthy recipient. When the case comes to court, Crown Prosecutors James Steele and Alesha Phillips are surprised to find a familiar face leading the defence team, and realise that the crux of the issue is the question of how far one should go to help a loved one.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Ronnie and Matt are surprised when a middle-class white girl who is found dead turns out to have been a drug mule. Her parents are distraught and baffled, but the investigation reveals that the perfect daughter who was about to go to university also had a secret life. There is a mysterious boyfriend nobody ever met and there are rumours of an active sex life and a coke dealer who disappeared. Gradually it becomes clear that the girl's motive was love, but the case falls apart when the sole witness retracts his statement.

programme.desc: Detective drama featuring Colin Dexter's enigmatic chief inspector. Morse investigates a murder that takes him away from the familiar setting of 20th-century Oxford to solving a canal murder in Oxford in 1859 - he becomes convinced that the boatmen publicly hanged for the murder were victims of a gross miscarriage of justice and, nearly 140 years after their deaths on the gallows, sets out to establish the true facts of the case.

programme.desc: Police drama set in a rural northern village. Tragedy strikes Aidensfield following a series of arson attacks, and Greengrass goes into the leisure industry.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a woman is crushed to death by a giant round of cheese at the home of the world-famous Midsomer Blue, Barnaby and Jones are soon on the case. Debbie Moffett worked at the dairy, founded by her colleague Jim Caxton, who seems more anxious about his precious cheese than Debbie's death. Later, Debbie's lover Oliver Ordish is garrotted with cheese wire and covered with cheese fly larvae. Jones then discovers that dairy owner Gregory Brantner was paying the dead man a consultancy fee. That night Gregory goes to investigate an alarm at the dairy and is stabbed through the heart with a cheese needle. Can Barnaby and Jones stop the killer before the bitterness of the past leads to yet more agonising deaths?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lily protests her innocence when Shane questions her about the raffle prize but Edna sees straight through her. Shane gives Jasmine a false tip-off about a drugs raid.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama set in a rural northern village. Gina finds herself accused of taking drugs as she attempts to rekindle her singing career. Following a windfall, David makes a foolish investment.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama set in a rural northern village. A new restaurant run by two brothers is the target of sabotage and an old friend of Gina's comes to stay in Aidensfield. Greengrass thinks he has unearthed his fortune after he develops an interest in archaeology.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama based on the novel of the same name by Ann Cleeves. Vera and the team investigate the case of a murdered social worker called Jenny Lister, a woman who was universally considered to have been principled and popular - in an overworked and understaffed social work system, a notorious case involving the death of a child seems to hold the key to solving the killing. Vera uses her innate empathy and intuition to pursue the truth behind the murder - when she discovers the real secret at the heart of Jenny's death, the killer will stop at nothing to keep it hidden.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: DS Ronnie Brooks agrees to help his old friend and partner DS Jimmy Valentine in an undercover drug sting. But a gun is pulled and someone ends up dead. What appears to be a tragic mistake is investigated by internal affairs and DS Matt Devlin who fears Jimmy is not all he seems. As they push for the truth the spotlight turns on Ronnie and, in particular, his dark past as a functioning alcoholic when a ten year old drug case was left with no witnesses and a large quantity of missing heroin. The evidence is stacking up against the police and James Steel and Alesha Phillips of the CPS battle Valentine's barrister, Evelyn Wyndham, to bring enough evidence to court. The jigsaw piece that will win it for them is Ronnie. But he refuses to testify. Is there something suspect in Ronnie's past that will end his career now? Can the CPS find any other way of proving their case or in court will it be Valentine's Day?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The drama based on the hit US show, which opens with a hard-hitting, emotional and thought-provoking episode dealing with the moral complexities of policing the crimes of minors and putting children on trial. When a young child is murdered, the terrifying CCTV footage of the boy being led to his death haunts both the police officers and legal team involved in the case. Detectives Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin find their investigation is made more shocking because the two suspects in the frame are children themselves - and each child blames the other. Can forensic evidence determine which youngster is responsible for the strangling of little Conor? Prosecutor George Castle defies his superiors and takes instruction from Conor's mother, who proves to have a surprising point of view on the crime. But can the justice system - and ultimately the government - afford to be lenient?

programme.desc: Barnaby and Nelson investigate a series of murders in Midsomer St Claire that seem to be inspired by macabre images on a medieval fresco recently discovered in the church crypt - as the village prepares for storms and flooding, it appears that someone is using ancient torture methods to punish modern-day sinners. Who is responsible and what motive do they have?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Brenda's hopes for a romantic dinner with Bob are dashed when he arrives to meet her with the twins in tow. Andy is irritated when Mick offers to help Jo by working on the farm.

programme.desc: Lily puts on a brave face in spite of illness as her colleagues berate her for lying about the raffle prize. Andy looks on jealously as Jo becomes closer to Mick's grandson Lee.

programme.desc: Tony wines and dines Rosie in a bid to make amends, but is unprepared for the surprise she springs on him. Carla drives Liam to distraction and Harry has unexpected news for Dan.

programme.desc: Police drama series set in a rural northern village. Mike and Jackie's future looks uncertain when Jackie's uncle becomes a suspect in a hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Detective series, based on the novels by Caroline Graham, that follows Inspector Barnaby as he investigates murder mysteries in Middle England. When a local property developer is diagnosed with a malignant brain tumour, a few people in the picturesque village of Badger's Drift suspect that he will soon be violently murdered - it is down to DCI Barnaby and DS Troy to unearth the reasoning behind this seemingly tragic crime. Was it motivated by suppressed ill feeling within the village, or could it stem from long-buried secrets deeply rooted in the past?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When the body of a teenage girl is found in her home, the police cannot be sure a crime was even committed. With no forensic evidence and nothing to suggest the victim did not die of natural causes, officers Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin question why they were even called out. But the girl's mother is convinced that her daughter was raped, and further investigation uncovers a murder weapon and a possible suspect. Senior crown prosecutor James Steel remembers this particular suspect well - and he is positive the man is guilty. Steel pursues him with every power available to him, pushing the law to its limit. His colleagues are unsure whether his fervour is justified, and they worry that he is hounding someone who has served his time in prison and paid his debt to society. Is Steel's instinct correct or is he persecuting an innocent man?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When three people are violently murdered and a fourth left for dead in a central London shop, DS Ronnie Brooks and DS Matt Devlin are up against the clock as they try to find the culprit, who they fear could strike again at any time. Their search is helped by information about the unusual murder weapon - a bayonet. When the investigation comes to court, senior crown prosecutor James Steel thinks he has a fairly open and shut case. But things take an unexpected turn when he discovers that the defendant has acquired some brilliant legal support. With the case for the defence looking stronger and stronger, Steel's only hope seems to be getting the accused man to accept responsibility for his actions - but his job is made tougher because the man is delusional. Then Steel is thrown for another loop when he realises he is facing a barrister he had not bargained for on the opposing bench.

programme.title: Shetland

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard. programme.title: Red Heat
programme.desc: Buddy cop action. Captain Ivan Danko of the Moscow Militia witnesses his partner gunned down by Georgian drug kingpin Viktor Rostavili, who flees the Soviet Union and heads to the United States - when Chicago cop Art Ridzic arrests Rostavili on murder charges and Danko is despatched to retrieve him, the two officers then find themselves unexpectedly partnered together when Viktor escapes custody. The taciturn Danko and street-wise Ridzic make for a mismatched pair, but the duo overcome their initial suspicions of each other and develop a mutual professional respect over the course of several violent run-ins with Rostavili and his American drug partners.

A vast and brooding lake that hides a dark history lies on the Canada-US border - it's an ancient and sacred site for Native Americans, but something has recently risen up from the depths to attack swimmers and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. In a journey that takes him to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest, extreme angler Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to catch the most ancient river monster of his career.

programme.desc: Action from the Gallagher PREM play-offs, as the remaining four teams look to secure their place in the final at Allianz Stadium. [S]

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his trusty companions Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back on the road scouring Britain's sheds and auction houses for hidden gems to restore and sell - in this episode, they delve into the cast-offs of top collector Matt XX and uncover a vintage Chopper and a motorised bicycle from the early 1950s. The trio head to an auto-jumble at Mallory Park race track after a quick visit to HJ Pugh's auction to beef up their inventory, but can they turn their finds into a profit or will the punters prove tougher than expected?

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard. In this episode, Britain's favourite biker rides through the gorgeous Lake District, celebrates the Vincent motorbike - the most expensive vintage brand in the world - and joins the Moto-Birds, an all-female motorbike display team from the 1970s, to take part in one of their most famous stunts.

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: The classic darts-based game show is back as host Freddie Flintoff is joined by three pairs of contestants each made up of a keen darts player (the 'thrower') and their partner (the 'knower') - the teams compete against each other by combining their skills at throwing darts at different game boards while answering questions correctly for points and prizes under the watchful eye of official scorer 'Little' Richard Ashdown. All the classic Bullseye rounds are back, including the Category Board, Pounds for Points and Bully's Prize Board, and the winning team will have a big decision to make at the end of the show - to risk everything they've won so far to try to win Bully's Mystery Star Prize. Also joining the fun is world darts champion Luke Littler, who partners with Freddie to try to complete a charity challenge.
